behaviorsAudited: runs TypeScript typecheck as a completion gate
runs production unused-code analysis as a completion gate
runs focused row tests, PTY validation, and visual smoke through row commands
runs the runtime build and package entrypoint verification as a completion gate
runs the AgenC TUI validation gate before completion
requires every row to declare executable commands and runs them during final checker execution
provides a project-local implementation-contract checker wrapper for final review enforcement

edgeCasesAudited: typecheck must pass after generated Neovim and workbench files are included
unused-production analysis must pass with the new provider modules and scripts reachable
build must regenerate runtime dist and verify package entrypoints
AgenC TUI validation must run from this repository path after source changes
the project-local checker wrapper must enforce inventory, edge cases, reviews, row-command presence, and row-command execution by default

behaviorEvidence: Typecheck is required by TODO.md:214, wired by parity/embedded-neovim-buffer.json:579, delegated from package.json:22 to runtime/package.json:30, and passed in the reviewer run.
Production unused-code analysis is required by TODO.md:215, wired by parity/embedded-neovim-buffer.json:580, implemented by runtime/package.json:47, and passed in the reviewer run.

Focused row tests, PTY validation, and visual smoke are required by TODO.md:216-218. All rows declare commands at parity/embedded-neovim-buffer.json:141-142,167-168,194-195,227-228,273-274,320-322,354-355,389-390,427-428,469-470,506-507,542-545,578-583,608-609; the e2e row includes the buffer PTY gate and visual smoke at parity/embedded-neovim-buffer.json:542-545. runtime/package.json:34 and runtime/package.json:39 expose those scripts, runtime/scripts/check-tui-workbench-buffer-neovim.mjs:9-19 runs the filtered PTY scenario, and runtime/scripts/check-tui-workbench-visual-smoke.mjs:48-77 exercises the visual workbench flow.

Runtime build and package entrypoint verification are required by TODO.md:219, wired by parity/embedded-neovim-buffer.json:581, delegated by package.json:12, implemented by runtime/package.json:26 and runtime/package.json:31, and passed with package entrypoints verified.
AgenC TUI validation is required by TODO.md:220, wired with the repository path by parity/embedded-neovim-buffer.json:582, and passed in the reviewer run.

Every row must declare executable commands and final checker execution must run them per TODO.md:221-222. scripts/check-embedded-neovim-buffer.mjs:9-18 defaults to --require-commands and --run-commands; check_contract.mjs:367-385 validates command arrays and check_contract.mjs:999-1049 executes row commands.

The project-local wrapper is scripts/check-embedded-neovim-buffer.mjs:6-24. It resolves the local matrix and implementation-contract checker, applies fail-closed defaults, and only suppresses --require-reviews plus --run-commands during AGENC_EMBEDDED_NEOVIM_CONTRACT_ROW_REVIEW=1 to avoid circular row-review dependence.
edgeCaseEvidence: The typecheck edge case passed with the current generated Neovim and workbench files included through npm run typecheck.

The TUI validation edge case passed through node ~/.claude/skills/agenc-tui-validate/scripts/run-tui-validate.mjs --repo /home/tetsuo/git/AgenC/agenc-core --full.
